headline: BreachRx Appoints Stephen Garcia as Chief Information Security Officer
summary: Veteran security leader to advance platform trust, bring frontline CISO perspective to product development, and help shape industry understanding of AI-driven threats Stephen Garcia Headshot Stephen Garcia, Chief Information Security Officer of BreachRx SAN FRANCISCO, June 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BreachRx, the leader in cyber incident response management (CIRM), today announced the appointment of Stephen Garcia as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). headline: Todd Diganci Joins Broadridge Board As Regulatory Oversight Gains Focus
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) has appointed Todd Diganci to its Board of Directors. Diganci will also serve on the Audit Committee, bringing experience in financial and regulatory oversight. His background includes senior leadership roles focused on U.S. securities regulation and financial stewardship. Broadridge Financial Solutions, trading at $146.44, has seen its share price decline 4.0% over the past week and 1.8% over the past month. Returns are also down 33.6% year to date...
